zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Lucy於1124年3月2日出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可比林福德時，她的父親Robert de Lucy32歲，母親Emma Beatrix de Sackville35歲。她和William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1198年9月8日在她的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Lucy于1124年3月2日出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可比林福德时，她的父亲Robert de Lucy32岁，母亲Emma Beatrix de Sackville35岁。她和William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1198年9月8日在她的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Lucy was born on 2 March 1124, in Billingford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Lucy, was 32 and her mother, Emma Beatrix de Sackville, was 35. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire. She died on 8 September 1198, in her hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Lucy est née le 2 mars 1124, à Billingford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Lucy, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Emma Beatrix de Sackville, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire. Elle est décédée le 8 septembre 1198, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Lucy am 2. März 1124 in Billingford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Lucy 32 und ihre Mutter Emma Beatrix de Sackville 35. Sie hatte mit William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. September 1198 im Alter von 74 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Lucy è nata il il 2 marzo 1124 nel Billingford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Lucy, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Emma Beatrix de Sackville, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire. Morì il 8 settembre 1198, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Lucyが1124年3月2日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクビリングフォードで生まれた時，父Robert de Lucyは32歳，母Emma Beatrix de Sackvilleは35歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshireとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1198年9月8日に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Lucy(이)가 1124년 3월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 빌링퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Lucy(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Beatrix de Sackville(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1198년 9월 8일 그녀의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.2 Mar 1124–8 Sep 1198: 2 de março de 1124–8 de setembro de 1198
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Lucy nasceu em 2 de março de 1124, em Billingford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Lucy, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Emma Beatrix de Sackville, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire. Ela faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1198, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Lucy родилась 2 марта 1124 г. в местности биллингфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Lucy было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Emma Beatrix de Sackville, 35. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire. Она умерла 8 сентября 1198 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

es.2 Mar 1124–8 Sep 1198: 2 de marzo de 1124–8 de septiembre de 1198
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Lucy nació el 2 de marzo de 1124, en Billingford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Lucy, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Emma Beatrix de Sackville, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1198, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
